_comment: Golden source-derived fields captured by running kbexplorer-template's scripts/generate-manifest.js (generateManifest()) against ./manifest-repo, then keeping only the fields buildManifest() derives from a RepoSource's local (FileSystemSource) acquisition path. Volatile/live-GitHub fields (issues, pullRequests, commits, branches, repoMetadata, generatedAt) are intentionally excluded — they come from `gh`/`git` CLI calls the template script makes directly and are NOT part of the RepoSource/RepoData contract FileSystemSource implements (it leaves them as documented safe no-ops; see filesystem-source.test.ts). `tree` entries are compared ignoring `size`: FileSystemSource's walk() (existing, pre-#17 behavior) does not stat files, while the template's walkFileSystem() does — an existing, out-of-scope engine/template divergence, not something buildManifest introduces.
